description: Golden fixtures whose externally sourced expected values are retained as the source of truth but cannot yet be reproduced by the executable runner. Failures are reported but not fatal (Rust: pricing.rs; Python: pytest.mark.xfail strict=False). Paths are relative to tests/golden/data/.

fixtures.reason: Bloomberg cap/floor fixture is not yet reproducible by the executable runner; preserve screen expected values until quote-basis cap/floor risk support lands.
